title: The Autobiography of Malcolm X
author: Malcolm X, Alex Haley
subline: Told through the words of the man himself, in his own voice.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant 1400px X dominates the lower 2/3, drawn as a wordmark in white 2px outline (the 'X' the man took as his name). A red dot at the intersection point. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" fill="none">
    <!-- A 1400px X (two crossing thick strokes) -->
    <line x1="-500" y1="-500" x2="500" y2="500" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="6"/>
    <line x1="-500" y1="500" x2="500" y2="-500" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="6"/>
    <!-- The centerpoint dot — RED, the 'eye' of the X -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="22" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Two thin guide rules above and below the X, anchoring the type -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="-580" x2="700" y2="-580" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="-700" y1="580" x2="700" y2="580" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- A whisper 'EID MUBARAK' style line: 'MALCOLM LITTLE → MALCOLM X' in small caps -->
    <text x="0" y="-620" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.3em">MALCOLM LITTLE → MALCOLM X</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The man WAS the X. A 1400px giant X drawn as two crossing 6px white strokes dominates the lower 2/3, with a RED 22px dot at the intersection point — the man at the center. A whisper line above: 'MALCOLM LITTLE → MALCOLM X' — the transformation. Title sits at the top, weight 500 command, UPPERCASE. Brand 'X' in the bottom-right; pill '1925·1965' at the bottom — the span of his life. The cover has only one job: be the X.
